lede: The sculpture trail is outdoors and open to visitors. Please treat it gently — the art lives in the weather.

items.label: Where
items.value: Shutesbury, Massachusetts, on the Bright Water Bog Loop.

items.label: Hours
items.value: The outdoor trail is best in daylight — dawn to dusk.

items.label: Please
items.value: The trail is outdoors; the home is private. Stay on the marked path and follow the trail signs.
